mapper.select: with count() as imp_count, countIf(click_flag) as click_count, sum(ecpc) * 1000 as total_ecpc, sum(ecpm) as total_ecpm, total_ecpm + total_ecpc as total_bid select ad_id, sub_ad_id, bundle, imp_count, click_count, total_bid, 0 as deep_count from ( with if(b.request_id != '', 1, 0) as click_flag select request_id, sub_ad_id, last_update_time, ad_id, bundle, ecpm, ecpc, click_flag from ( select request_id, sub_ad_id, last_update_time, ad_id, bundle, bid as ecpm from statics_imp_new_all sina where last_update_time >= #{startTime} and last_update_time < #{staticsEndTime} and ad_id = #{adId} ) a global left join ( select request_id, bid as ecpc from statics_click_new_all scna where last_update_time >= #{startTime} and last_update_time < #{staticsEndTime} and ad_id = #{adId} ) b on a.request_id = b.request_id group by request_id, last_update_time, ad_id, sub_ad_id, bundle, ecpm, ecpc, click_flag order by request_id asc, last_update_time asc limit 1 by request_id ) group by ad_id, sub_ad_id, bundle
